name: PWD Benefits (Magna Carta for Disabled Persons / RA 7277)
description: Legal entitlements for persons with disability including ID, discounts, and priority in employment and education
benefits: 20% discount on medicines, medical/diagnostic services, and basic necessities; 5% VAT exemption; priority in government programs
documents: Medical Certificate from licensed physician (within 1 year)
PWD ID application form (from MSWDO or PDAO)
office: Municipal Social Welfare Office (MSWDO) or Persons with Disability Affairs Office (PDAO)
next_steps: Get a medical certificate confirming your disability from a licensed doctor
Apply for PWD ID at MSWDO or PDAO
Present PWD ID for discounts at pharmacies, hospitals, and transport
